approval_statement: I, edithatogo, approve bounded pilot analyst execution request v0.2 SHA-256 ac83c06f129e11a19fb6a3bbd24a1023018ee508092a569b6a91b38188a7517b as committed in 02c25d5a038cd799d047575281d0732f57347705. I authorize creation of the final analyst-access authorization and production clean-HEAD verifier for the bounded local two-case pilot covering requests 11872 and 35076. After that authorization is separately committed and its exact verifier passes, it may authorize local derived-text reading, context materialization and presentation, and two isolated first-pass executions by agent:bounded-pilot-analyst-a and agent:bounded-pilot-analyst-b under the exact prompts, codebook, provenance pins, and isolation rules recorded by that request. Analyst peer outputs must remain hidden until both complete result sets are schema-valid and hash-locked. This approval does not authorize reconciliation; the distinct reconciler requires a separate permission after both analyst locks verify. It does not authorize empirical-result approval, population inference, archive-wide claims, human-reviewed claims, gold promotion, legal certification, redistribution, publication, training, fine-tuning, release, dataset publication, or paper updates.
